title: minuartia geniculata var. linearifolia
intro: Minuartia geniculata var. linearifolia, also known as the Alpine Spring Beauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Minuartia geniculata var. linearifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
